raw.summary: Self-taught full-stack engineer who bridges customer needs with production code. Built AI-powered platforms processing 1M+ events/hour at RootCluster and shipped customer-facing Adobe extensions at Vogel Edits. Combines deep Node.js/TypeScript expertise with hands-on AI/LLM experience and a track record of direct enterprise customer engagement — debugging integrations, leading onboarding, and shipping fixes in live environments.

work.name: Vogel Edits
highlights: Built and shipped production Adobe After Effects & Premiere Pro extensions, including Vanish BG — a real-time AI background removal tool at aescripts.com, running ML inference inside a sandboxed CEP environment.

Solved Adobe's restricted CEP runtime by designing a Node.js sidecar process architecture that handles AI inference outside the sandbox, using local HTTP for IPC and streaming results back to the React UI in real time — directly analogous to debugging and extending third-party integrations in customer environments.
Built a TTS Premiere Pro extension using Node.js with local ONNX model inference, designing the full audio pipeline from text input to rendered timeline clip.
Collaborated asynchronously with designers and stakeholders as the primary technical point of contact, shipping production tools using agile workflows.

work.name: Freelance
highlights: Built a full-stack tourism booking platform using Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js with TypeORM for type-safe PostgreSQL access.
Applied PostgreSQL indexing strategies and EXPLAIN ANALYZE to achieve sub-100ms API response times under concurrent load.
Integrated Paymob payment gateway with idempotent transaction handling and webhook verification, reducing checkout friction by 40%.
Improved SEO and Core Web Vitals to 95+ Lighthouse score using Next.js SSR, image optimization, and lazy loading.

projects.name: RootCluster — AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed a distributed log ingestion pipeline on AWS ECS Fargate processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency — an AI-native platform that required deep prompt engineering, model optimization, and direct troubleshooting of complex pipelines.
highlights: Reduced ONNX embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batch processing, Redis caching, and worker autoscaling.
Designed event-driven pipeline: normalize → embed → cluster → merge → root cause, with retries, exponential backoff, DLQs, and idempotent processing.
Implemented centroid-based pgvector clustering to unify cross-service failures into single root causes.
Set up full CI/CD with GitHub Actions OIDC, ECR, SSM Parameter Store, RDS PostgreSQL, and ElastiCache.
Applied PostgreSQL internals (MVCC, isolation levels, indexing) to build high-throughput write pipeline avoiding lock contention.

projects.name: Medical CRM — AI-Enhanced Prescription Platform
projects.description: Full-stack CRM handling diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records with AI-enhanced drug interaction validation.
highlights: Implemented JWT auth with access/refresh token rotation and RBAC across three permission levels.
Designed drug interaction validation across 500+ medications using graph-based PostgreSQL lookup.
Optimized dashboard queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and window functions.

keywords: AWS (ECS Fargate, ECR, RDS, ElastiCache, Lambda, SSM)

education.notes: Self-taught software engineer since 2022, learning by building production systems in evenings and weekends.
